referencePrinciplesForThePit: Use Batodex/SAP as baseline: short effects, obvious trigger, one positional/support idea at a time.
Ignore Mythical Batomon for current balancing inspiration; they are preserved only for later reference.
Treat level 4 as bonus-only inspiration, not normal progression; The Pit normal progression remains level 1-3.
Use The Bazaar as a spice source for occasional rare effects, not as the primary complexity target.
